ship.name: Dirty Drive Tuning
ship.effect: Increases speed and agility at the cost of higher heat output

ship.name: Clean Drive Tuning
ship.effect: Increases speed with reduced heat output

ship.name: Overcharged
ship.effect: Increases power output at the cost of higher heat generation

ship.name: Enhanced, Low Power
ship.effect: Reduces power draw while maintaining shield strength

ship.name: Efficient
ship.effect: Reduces power draw and heat generation

ship.name: Thermal Vent
ship.effect: Vents heat when beam is active, cooling the ship

ship.name: Focused
ship.effect: Reduces damage falloff and increases penetration

ship.name: Weapon Focused
ship.effect: Increases weapons capacitor size and recharge rate

onfoot.name: Improved Jump Assist
onfoot.effect: Improves jump assist duration and height

onfoot.name: Faster Handling
onfoot.effect: Reduces weapon handling time (ADS and switch speed)
